length_bias_critic_note: Fixed in critic cycle 1: q1 correct answer shortened; q2 d3 lengthened; q4 d1 and d3 lengthened; q6 d2 and d3 lengthened. All questions now pass mean_distractor * 1.20 threshold.

questions.objective_ref: Explain what a plain-English specification is and why writing it before any code reduces errors.
Write a specification naming inputs, types, constraints, the expected output, and at least two examples.
Identify the four-step spec-first workflow: specify, prompt, explain every line, test edge cases.
Explain why you cannot verify AI-generated code unless you can predict its output from the spec before running it.
Map the grade-average lab script to each part of a specification (inputs, outputs, constraints, examples).
Explain what a plain-English specification is and why writing it before any code reduces errors (scope and completeness applied).
